notes: PRIMARY geometry volume = KRAV - VGU Vägars och gators utformning, Trafikverket Publikation 2022:001 (ISBN 978-91-7725-946-6, 2022-01-01, 365 pp), which contains the geometric requirement chapters incl. linjeföring (alignment) and sektion (cross-section), gradients/lutning. Verified text contains 'linjeföring' and 'sektion'. Downloaded from official Trafikverket DiVA repository. EDITION NOTE: As of 2025-01-01 VGU was restructured into Trafikverket's digital regelverk PUBEN as TRVINFRA-00396 'Krav och Råd Vägars och gators utformning' (no standalone PDF; JS web app at https://puben.trafikverket.se/dpub/visa-dokument/6f24d1e8-81bf-4e7a-948a-200e71c92f66) with companion values doc TRV 2024:148 'KRAV Grundvärden VGU' (PDF, see extras). The 2022:001-003 publications remain officially applicable for projects procured/planned before 2025-01-01 and are the last fully self-contained downloadable PDFs covering the complete geometric chapters. ADDITIONAL VALIDATED FILES in folder: (1) VGU_Krav_Grundvarden_TRV2024-148.pdf — CURRENT-edition KRAV Grundvärden (TRV 2024:148, ISBN 978-91-8045-364-6, 2024-11-01, 58 pp, sha256 91a75dddfb58c4623fc22a5f46fa9bc2f3b8697da3b7cf2cd4d4e2de59059470, 2681124 bytes; design-speed/radii/sight grundvärden & formulas; src https://trafikverket.diva-portal.org/smash/get/diva2:1909331/FULLTEXT01.pdf). (2) VGU_Begrepp_och_grundvarden_Publikation2022-002.pdf — Begrepp och grundvärden 2022:002 (ISBN 978-91-7725-947-3, 139 pp, sha256 99583150c15a51eb0e01d97a41e6514d7c65c9ee0b2ec76a0b28ef1a7300ae08, 2248650 bytes; src https://trafikverket.diva-portal.org/smash/get/diva2:1621296/FULLTEXT02.pdf). (3) VGU_Rad_Publikation2022-003.pdf — RÅD VGU 2022:003 (guidance/advice with detailed linjeföring & sektion design chapters, 500 pp, sha256 257055cce0889828bf791afff00eb6d3eb73c8c60f51c1dd07d1694a77705d45, 15533521 bytes; src https://trafikverket.diva-portal.org/smash/get/diva2:1621302/FULLTEXT03.pdf). All four PDFs validated ok=true. Official sources only (Trafikverket DiVA repository).
